ddls:
CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* Row ID from the original dataset */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "BUYI" INTEGER /* Binary flag indicating if the customer made a purchase (1) or not (0) */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Confidence value of the prediction */,
  "predicted_label" INTEGER /* Predicted label (1 for purchase, 0 for no purchase) */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version used for the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "prediction_explanation" TEXT /* Brief explanation or reasoning behind the prediction */,
  "prediction_source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction (e.g., API, batch job) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("model_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "trained_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, retired) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., logistic regression, neural network) */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training process */,
  "training_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model was trained (e.g., cloud, on-premises) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "metric_threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("model_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the dataset was used to train */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "data_schema" TEXT /* Schema of the dataset */,
  "data_quality_score" TEXT /* Quality score for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_datasets_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("model_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., data scientist, marketer, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., prediction_id, dataset_id) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration setting (e.g., hyperparameter, feature) */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the configuration setting is the default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configs_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("model_version_id")
)
